home.whoWeAreCopy: Greenfields is a premier independent advisory firm dedicated to the development sustainable infrastructure and industries. We partner and work with and within countries in developing economies to develop, mobilise finance, build and operate infrastructure and industrial projects while delivering superior economic, financial and social returns.

about.aboutIntro: Delivering sustainable finance and advisory services across Africa. We strongly believe in sustainable development and focus on projects that deliver financial, economic and social outcomes for various stakeholders.
about.companyNarrative: Greenfields, also known more affectionately as Greeny, is an independent transaction advisory and economic development consultancy focus on driving sustainable infrastructure and industrial development across the African continent. With a strong specialisation in infrastructure development and finance that brings together the skills and experience of our multinational team that has worked on transactions in excess of R800 billion across project and infrastructure finance, corporate advisory and public and private capital markets, we have built a reputation over the last decade on delivering innovative development and finance solutions for infrastructure and industrial projects. Established over 10 years ago as a majority black women-owned and managed firm, and with a presence in a network of offices in Sub-Saharan Africa, we offer bespoke transaction advisory and support, with a “boots on ground approach” that provides you with local knowledge, culture and expertise.
about.purposeStatement: Please use following text under Our Purpose: We live to accelerate the development of sustainable infrastructure, industry and commerce by unlocking projects and transactions that matter. We ensure that we deliver quality services that support our clients, enable innovation and deliver superior economic, financial and social returns. performance.

Services
Strategic and Policy Advisory
We provide strategic planning and policy advice to
companies and the public to identify and craft the
best possible policies and strategies for projects,
ensuring that all aspects of the project are properly
thought out, planned and managed
Procurement Support
We have been involved in designing and
evaluating numerous infrastructure procurement
request for qualification and proposal and can help
public and private sector clients develop and
respond to tenders using the most cost-effective
and efficient procurement strategies for projects.
We will provide guidance on the best contract
terms, and pricing models to ensure that clients
get the most value from projects.
Corporate Advisory
We advise companies on strategic decisions
regarding how to deploy and allocate their capital
and the best means of structuring and raising
financing. We also offer advice and execution
support for acquisitions, sales, and fundraising to
ensure you achieve your objectives with efficiency
and confidence.
Project and Infrastructure Finance
We advise companies and government on the
development of sustainable infrastructure
solutions from opportunity study phases all the
way to financial close, ensuring that we help you
structure and raise structured financing on a
limited or non recourse basis
Economic Development Advisory
Our economic development assessments and
advisory help clients make informed decisions
about their new or existing projects. By providing a
comprehensive analysis of the economic impact of
a proposed project, we can help clients measure
and understand the potential economic costs and
benefits associated with their decisions.
Transaction Support
We provide specialized, end-to-end transaction
support solutions for mergers, acquisitions,
disposals, and restructurings to maximize deal
value and mitigate risks.
PPP Advisory
Our team has been at the part of some of Africa’s
most recent PPP deals, providing comprehensive,
strategic and commercial legal advice in
